task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the correct case in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase interface is visible with the case titled 'Noise Complaint - Downtown Construction' opened.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new Inbound Correspondence record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or section specifically for creating a new 'Inbound Correspondence' is open within the ArkCase UI.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Subject for the correspondence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field in the correspondence form contains exactly 'Urgent: Construction Violation Report'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Sender details extracted from the email file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sender or From field in the correspondence form contains 'Alice Neighbor' and/or 'alice.neighbor@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Body content extracted from the email file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Body, Message, or Description field in the correspondence form contains text from the email, specifically including the phrase 'violation of the city noise ordinance'.

task_completion.description: Attach the original .eml file to the correspondence record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'evidence_email.eml' is visible in the attachments or uploaded files section of the correspondence record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase web application to create the record, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the .eml file to extract the sender and body.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent opening '/home/ga/Documents/evidence_email.eml' in a text editor, terminal (e.g., using cat), or email client to read its contents before filling out the form.

integrity.description: The agent used the file upload mechanism to attach the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog or drag-and-drop action is visible selecting '/home/ga/Documents/evidence_email.eml', rather than just typing the file path into a generic text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct case title in ArkCase is 'Noise Complaint - Downtown Construction'. The correspondence Subject must be 'Urgent: Construction Violation Report'. The Sender extracted from the file should be 'Alice Neighbor' (alice.neighbor@example.com). The Body extracted from the file must contain the text 'violation of the city noise ordinance'. The attached file must be 'evidence_email.eml' located at /home/ga/Documents/.
